author: Physical AI Toolchain Security Team
_note: The inference image uses 'scratch' as its base (no OS, no packages, no executable runtime). The image is a passive model artifact carrier mounted into consumer pods via OCI image volumes (KEP-4639) and is never executed. There is no scannable CVE surface, so this document intentionally contains zero statements. If the base image is ever changed to a runnable distribution, regenerate via scripts/security/generate-vex.sh and triage each statement before committing.
